# Control-target images generation for i2i edit training with diiffusion pipe etc...

## [**Example**](https://comfyui.rozenlaan.site/ComfyUI_image/)

Use the clothing from Reference 1 on person from Reference 0.
Preserve face, anatomy, pose, body proportions, lighting, and realism.

preserve torso anatomy, preserve waist structure, preserve abdominal proportions, consistent navel position, preserve body proportions, same body geometry, anatomically consistent midriff.

different person, identity drift, different pose, different body shape, deformed anatomy, bad proportions, extra limbs, mutated hands, incorrect clothing fit, floating clothing, misaligned clothes, cgi, cartoon, anime, unrealistic lighting, shifted navel, distorted abdomen, warped torso, deformed waist, unrealistic stomach, asymmetrical torso, body deformation, stretched anatomy, malformed midriff
